chosenApproach.description: One-paragraph statement of the single approach this plan commits to.

plan.description: The full implementation plan as markdown for a zero-context engineer: Definition of done, Approach, In scope / Deferred, Build steps (file map first, then bite-sized tasks with exact file ownership + interfaces), and a Stack & design acceptance-criteria checklist.

keyConstraints.description: The hard constraints this plan respects (repo guards, RLS/auth, cost caps, contracts), each phrased as the failure it prevents.

risksOrDisagreements.description: Points where this plan is most likely to diverge from a reasonable alternative, and anything a reconciling reviewer should scrutinize before committing. Empty array is valid.
